query: cat ~/.hermes-nanobot/gateway_state.json 2>/dev/null; echo "===PID==="; cat ~/.hermes-nanobot/gateway.pid 2>/dev/null; echo "===PROC_CHECK==="; ps aux | grep -i nanobot | grep -v grep; echo "===HERMES_VERSION==="; source ~/hermes-venv/bin/activate && hermes --version 2>/dev/null; echo "===GATEWAY_CMD==="; source ~/hermes-venv/bin/activate && hermes gateway --help 2>/dev/null | head -20
